title: FAISS
wikilinks: Two-Stage Retrieval with Structural LLM Re-Ranking
Proxy-Pointer RAG: Structure Meets Scale at 100% Accuracy with Smarter Retrieval
summary: FAISS is a vector search library used for semantic recall in the Proxy-Pointer pipeline. It retrieves the top 200 chunks by embedding similarity, providing broad coverage for subsequent structural re-ranking.
